title: pluchea kelleri
intro: Pluchea kelleri, also known as the Keller's pluchea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Australia and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pluchea kelleri include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and skin conditions.
